english: my": a) Viṣṇu; b) gods.
poet. wine; araka.
see above.
poet. the planet Venus (lit. the lord of asuras).
poet. cinnabar (lit. child of the asuras).
poet. the planet Venus (lit. the spiritual Teacher of the asuras).
russian: поэт. планета Венера (букв. духовный наставник асуров).

english: poet. n. of a grain.

wylie: lha min lag pa'i mdzub rin
english: n. of a medicinal plant the leaves of which are used for wounds and sores.
russian: назв. лекарственного растения, листьями которого лечат раны и язвы.

english: "the God of the asuras" (epith. of Varuṇa the god of water).
"the Teacher of gods and men" (epith. of Buddha).
1) goddess; 2) the goddess Umā; 3) noble lady.
"Giving pleasure to the goddesses" (epith. of Viṣṇu).
Māyādevī (n. of the mother of Gautama Buddha).
fairy.
"Great goddess" (epith. of the goddes Umā).
"horse of a goddess" (n. of an insect).

wylie: lha mo'i mdung gi mdzub rin
english: n. of an officinal herb used in ulcers and wounds.
russian: назв. лекарственной травы, применяемой для лечения язв и ран.

english: "Reverend God" (respectful address to the Tibetan kings).
poet. heaven (lit. place of entertainments of gods).
see above.
1) buddh. long-lived gods (according to Buddhism gods are also mortal); 2) buddh. the last subdivision of the fourth dhyāna heaven.
russian: 1) будд. долговечные боги (согласно буддизму, боги также смертны); 2) будд. последнее подразделение неба четвёртой дхьяны.

english: 1) n. of the seventeenth constellation or lunar mansion; 2) n. of the 16th star in the Scorpion.
russian: 1) назв. семнадцатого созвездия; 2) назв. 16-й звезды в созвездии Скорпиона.

english: poet. pond.
poet. fire; the god of fire (lit. god's face).
russian: поэт. огонь; божество огня (букв. лик божества).

english: buddh. mild aspect of any god.
divine presence, divine enlightenment.
